description_long: This is an ornate, octagonal stone fountain featuring a central pedestal topped with a classical bronze statue of a robed female figure. The statue stands on a circular plinth surrounded by a shallow basin, with four large stone urns symmetrically placed at the corners of the inner structure. Each urn is mounted on a square pedestal, and the fountain's base is paved with large, weathered stone tiles. The fountain includes multiple water basins and spouts, with decorative reliefs and sculpted details on the pedestals. The overall design is grand and formal, suitable for placement in a public square or park.
description: An octagonal stone fountain with a central bronze statue, four urns on pedestals, and decorative basins. The structure is richly detailed and set on a paved stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the statue facing forward, with the main basin and two urns clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetry of the urns and the detailed stonework of the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the statue in profile and the arrangement of urns and basins visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the statue and the rear basin, with all four urns in view.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a classical bronze statue of a robed woman, ornate stone urns with sculpted reliefs, and decorative motifs on the pedestals. The stonework is detailed with carved lines and subtle engravings, giving the structure a historic and artistic appearance.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is octagonal and shallow, with a raised circular platform at the center supporting the statue. Four smaller basins are integrated into the pedestals beneath each urn, and the rim is broad and flat.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present in the current state of the fountain.
